movie.overview: In 1916, a Chicago steel worker accidentally kills his supervisor and flees to the Texas panhandle with his girlfriend and little sister to work harvesting wheat in the fields of a stoic farmer.
movie.tagline: She gave her hand to one man, but her heart to another.
movie.title: Days of Heaven

results.name: Tim Blake Nelson announces DAYS OF HEAVEN for AFI Movie Club
Cinematographer Néstor Almendros on DAYS OF HEAVEN
